title: Marine Management Organisation Annual Report and Accounts 1 April 2023 to 31 March 2024
body: "This annual report and accounts sets out MMO’s purpose, objectives and performance during 2023/24.  Background  The annual report and accounts covers the financial year 2023/24. This paper was laid before Parliament on 28 January 2025 in response to a legislative requirement or as a Return to an Address and was ordered to be printed by the House of Commons. "
